productDisplayName: Nike Men Dart 9 Leather White Sports Shoes
description: Created to give a great running experience, the nike Dart 9 Leather running shoe is a top performer. Plush cushioning and great flexibility combine in this sneaker that stands up to everyday wear and tear. The leather uppers provide great durability, not to mention giving a great stylish look; while all the support features you expect from nike ensure your foot is protected and supported when you run. Upper Sleek leather upper with stylish silver overlays which give support and shoe structure Highly padded mesh collar and tongue offering exceptional comfort and breathability Lace-up system for a snug Fit Midsole Foam midsole for ultra-lightweight, springy cushioning and soft, responsive shock absorption Dynamic Support system to adapt to your stride with Impact Groove support zone Padded footbed for all-day comfort Outsole Non-marking rubber outsole for durability Raised lugs and deep grooves for maximum traction, with a scooped heel for extra cushioning Flex grooves at the outsole for a more natural range of motion and enhanced flexibility Shoe care Wipe surface with damp, clean cloth to remove dust Do not machine wash or store in direct sunlight
